dark.customCSS: body { background: #0a0a0a; color: #a8ffa8; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.05rem; text-shadow: 0 0 3px #00ff00, 0 0 6px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.7); } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 3px, 100% 100%; animation: scan 7s linear infinite; } @keyframes scan { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 100%; } } .bg-gray-800, .bg-gray-850, .bg-gray-900 { background: rgba(8, 24, 8, 0.85) !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.25), 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.4); border-radius: 0; } input, textarea, .prose { background: #031a03 !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; color: #a8ffa8; caret-color: #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.35); } button.bg-blue-500, button.bg-blue-600 { background: #00ff00 !important; color: #0a0a0a; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff00; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #00ff00; border-radius: 0; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #020f02; }

light.customCSS: body { background: #0a0a0a; color: #a8ffa8; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.05rem; text-shadow: 0 0 3px #00ff00, 0 0 6px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.7); } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 3px, 100% 100%; animation: scan 7s linear infinite; } @keyframes scan { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 100%; } } .bg-gray-800, .bg-gray-850, .bg-gray-900 { background: rgba(8, 24, 8, 0.85) !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.25), 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.4); border-radius: 0; } input, textarea, .prose { background: #031a03 !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; color: #a8ffa8; caret-color: #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.35); } button.bg-blue-500, button.bg-blue-600 { background: #00ff00 !important; color: #0a0a0a; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff00; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #00ff00; border-radius: 0; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #020f02; }

dark.customCSS: body { font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace !important; text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 176, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 0.5px; } /* Scanline Overlay */ body::after { content: ''; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 4px, 6px 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 99999; } /* Flatten UI */ * { border-radius: 2px !important; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ffb000 !important; } ::selection { background: #ffb000; color: #000000; }

oled.customCSS: * { border-radius: 0px !important; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace !important; } ::selection { background: #000000; color: #FFFF00; } input, textarea { border: 2px solid #000000 !important; background-color: #FFFFFF !important; color: #000000 !important; } button { border: 2px solid #000000 !important; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px #000000 !important; }

light.customCSS: /* CRT scanlines & glow */ body { background: #0a0a0a; color: #a8ffa8; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.05rem; text-shadow: 0 0 3px #00ff00, 0 0 6px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.7); } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 3px, 100% 100%; animation: scan 7s linear infinite; } @keyframes scan { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 100%; } } /* Phosphor panels */ .bg-gray-800, .bg-gray-850, .bg-gray-900 { background: rgba(8, 24, 8, 0.85) !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.25), 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.4); border-radius: 0; } /* Terminal inputs */ input, textarea, .prose { background: #031a03 !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; color: #a8ffa8; caret-color: #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.35); } /* Monochrome buttons */ button.bg-blue-500, button.bg-blue-600 { background: #00ff00 !important; color: #0a0a0a; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff00; } /* Retro scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #00ff00; border-radius: 0; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #020f02; }

her.customCSS: /* CRT scanlines & glow */ body { background: #0a0a0a; color: #a8ffa8; font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.05rem; text-shadow: 0 0 3px #00ff00, 0 0 6px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.7); } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 3px, 100% 100%; animation: scan 7s linear infinite; } @keyframes scan { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 100%; } } /* Phosphor panels */ .bg-gray-800, .bg-gray-850, .bg-gray-900 { background: rgba(8, 24, 8, 0.85) !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.25), 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.4); border-radius: 0; } /* Terminal inputs */ input, textarea, .prose { background: #031a03 !important; border: 1px solid #00ff00; color: #a8ffa8; caret-color: #00ff00; box-shadow: inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.35); } /* Monochrome buttons */ button.bg-blue-500, button.bg-blue-600 { background: #00ff00 !important; color: #0a0a0a; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff00; } /* Retro scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #00ff00; border-radius: 0; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #020f02; }

themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)
themes.description: Faithful recreation of the infamous Windows 3.1 Hot Dog Stand color scheme with retro pixel rain Canvas FX.
